title: piperaceae
intro: The Piperaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the pepper family. This family consists of approximately 425 species of plants, which are mostly found in tropical regions of the world. The plants within the Piperaceae family are often aromatic and produce small, white or purple flowers. They include popular edible species such as black pepper (Piper nigrum) and other plants used in traditional medicine and culinary practices.
